title: 10 best herbal tinctures for peptic ulcers
description: Horse chestnut tinctures helps with peptic ulcers because of its ability to soothe and protect the mucous membranes lining the stomach. The tannins present in horse chestnut have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce inflammation and irritation caused by peptic ulcers. Additionally, the astringent properties of horse chestnut can help tighten and repair damaged tissues, promoting healing and reducing the risk of complications.
